SEARCH
Package com.comp2042.view.manager

Class GameBoardRenderer

java.lang.Object
com.comp2042.view.manager.GameBoardRenderer
public class GameBoardRenderer extends Object
Responsible for rendering the static game board background.

This class manages the display matrix of rectangles that represent the game board, and provides efficient incremental rendering by caching the board state.

Responsibilities:

  • Initialize and manage the display matrix (Rectangle[][])
  • Refresh the game background with incremental updates
  • Calculate grid positions for brick placement
  • Manage board state caching for performance optimization

Design Pattern: Extracted from GuiController to adhere to Single Responsibility Principle (SRP)

Version:
Phase 3 - SRP Refactoring
Author:
Dong, Jia

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    GameBoardRenderer(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gamePanel)
    Constructs a GameBoardRenderer for the specified GridPane.

    Method

    double
    calculateGridX(int column)
    Calculates the absolute X position for the specified column within the grid.

    Calculates the absolute Y position for the specified row within the grid.

    Clears the display matrix by resetting all cells to transparent.

  • Constructor Details

    • GameBoardRenderer

      public GameBoardRenderer(javafx.scene.layout.GridPane gamePanel)
      Constructs a GameBoardRenderer for the specified GridPane.
      Parameters:
      gamePanel - the GridPane that will contain the board display

  • Method Details

    • initializeBoard

      public void initializeBoard(int[][] boardMatrix)
      Initializes the display matrix based on the provided board matrix. Creates Rectangle objects for each cell and adds them to the GridPane.
      Parameters:
      boardMatrix - the initial board state matrix

    • refreshGameBackground

      public void refreshGameBackground(int[][] board)
      Refreshes the game background with the updated board state. Uses incremental rendering by only updating cells that have changed.
      Parameters:
      board - the updated board matrix

    • calculateGridX

      public double calculateGridX(int column)
      Calculates the absolute X position for the specified column within the grid.
      Parameters:
      column - the zero-based column index
      Returns:
      the computed X coordinate in pixels

    • calculateGridY

      public double calculateGridY(int row)
      Calculates the absolute Y position for the specified row within the grid.
      Parameters:
      row - the zero-based row index
      Returns:
      the computed Y coordinate in pixels

    • clearBoard

      public void clearBoard()
      Clears the display matrix by resetting all cells to transparent.

    • reset

      public void reset()
      Resets the renderer, clearing the display matrix reference. This allows for clean reinitialization.

    • getDisplayMatrix

      public javafx.scene.shape.Rectangle[][] getDisplayMatrix()
      Gets the display matrix.
      Returns:
      the current display matrix, or null if not initialized
